description: Bifolio of piyyuṭim. Underneath the piyyuṭ on the righthand page of fol. 1r, there are two columns of private accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. The right column lists sums of 17 dirhams + 14 dirhams owed by Bū l-Manṣūr, 1 dirham by Abū ʿAlī, and 10 owed to Abū l-Faraj Ibn al-Kallām (cf. ENA NS 68.8 (PGPID 12231)). The left column refers to a total sum of 45 dirhams owed to 'my brothers' mainly for jewelry.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
